summary: Frontend-only testing of Projects rotating cylinder. Verified: (1) clicking side/background cards opens THAT card's specific detail modal (Mango left-side and Real-Time Chat App right-side both matched titles + project-detail-link href); (2) front/center card also opens its own modal (Sunflower verified); (3) Play/Auto toggle button removed (data-testid 'project-autoplay' not present in either inline or fullscreen mode); (4) Prev/Next arrows visible, functional and can bring all 6 projects to the front; (5) fullscreen overlay opens/closes correctly with Prev/Next only; (6) modal closes via project-detail-close; (7) no horizontal page scroll at 1440/1280/390; (8) mobile arrow tappable (42x42 bbox). No runtime error overlay.
critical_code_review_comments: Projects.jsx line 127: pointerEvents is 'auto' when front>-0.5, meaning the fully-rear card (front<=-0.5) is intentionally non-clickable — matches spec. Side cards with low opacity (~0.25) but still front>-0.5 are clickable, aligning with requirements.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Projects cylinder: 6 cards, autoplay initially, disabled after first arrow click or drag. Side card click opens correct modal via setSelected(p). No project-autoplay testid anywhere. Backend not tested per request.
